shared_properties: Head crest, eye-glow placement, and base torso proportion match the idle master asset.
The silhouette remains mostly solid black with the same restrained teal highlight treatment.
differences: Adds a longer stride with alternating forward and back leg pushes across eight frames.
Lower cloak wisps trail backward to indicate horizontal speed.
The torso leans slightly forward to communicate momentum while staying readable in silhouette.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Reuse the player SpriteSheetBundle and swap to the run atlas clip when horizontal velocity exceeds the walk threshold.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_run_8f_12fps.png during Loading and cache the eight-frame atlas as the run state.
runtime_notes: Stride timing assumes 12 fps playback while gameplay movement uses 240 px per second.
Feet should return cleanly to a baseline so the run cycle blends into jump takeoff without a visible pop.
Do not widen the silhouette so much that narrow shadow corridors become visually ambiguous.

context.usage: Primary locomotion state for traversing newly created shadow paths between mirrors, prisms, and scale decks.

shape.silhouette: Forward-leaning Umbra run with alternating strides, one arm leading, and a narrow trail of lower-body wisps.

motion.cadence_notes: Eight frames cover one full left-right stride cycle.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x48 px with eight 32x48 frames.
At least two frames show clear contact poses and two show a passing pose so motion reads as a continuous loop.
The silhouette never extends more than 4 px beyond the idle torso width, preserving narrow-path readability.
